description_long: This shotgun features a robust, compact design with a matte black metal body and a short, thick barrel. The receiver and barrel are adorned with subtle, engraved patterns, adding a touch of visual interest to the otherwise utilitarian appearance. The grip is crafted from dark wood with ergonomic finger grooves, providing a secure and comfortable hold. The trigger guard is large and rounded, integrated smoothly into the grip for easy access. The muzzle is wide and reinforced, suggesting a high-caliber, close-range weapon. Overall, the shotgun exudes a modern, tactical aesthetic suitable for urban environments.
description: A compact, matte black shotgun with engraved details, a wooden ergonomic grip, and a wide reinforced barrel, exuding a tactical urban style.
description_view_0: Side view showing the engraved barrel, wooden grip with finger grooves, and the overall compact, tactical design.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the wide, reinforced muzzle and the symmetrical alignment of the barrel.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the engraved barrel, wooden grip, and the robust receiver.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the back of the grip and the alignment of the receiver and barrel.
attribute_barrel_configuration: single-barrel, short and wide with reinforced muzzle and engraved details
attribute_trigger_guard_design: large, rounded trigger guard integrated with the grip and featuring ergonomic finger grooves
